characteristics.name: 說明
characteristics.$text:
While an 敵方單位 is only within Engagement 射程 of one or more 防禦工事s 你軍隊中的:
- That unit can still be 被選為目標 of ranged attacks, but 每當 such an attack is made, unless it is made with a 手槍, subtract 1 from the 命中擲骰.
- Models in 該單位 do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while 戰鬥震懾ed, except for those that will move over 敵方模型 when doing so.

characteristics.$text:
In your 射擊階段, 每當 you select a **^^Crossfire^^** unit to shoot, 你可以選擇 up to two other **^^Crossfire^^** units from your Crusade army that are eligible to shoot to perform a Deadly Crossfire, Then, 你可以選擇 one 敵方單位 that would be an eligible target for one or more ranged weapons equipped by models in each of the selected **^^Crossfire^^** units. 直到該回合結束, that 敵方單位 is a Crossfire target.

每當 one of those selected **^^Crossfire^^** units makes a ranged attack, 該單位中的模型 can only target their Crossfire target, and:
- If two **^^Crossfire^^** units were selected to perform a Deadly Crossfire against the at 敵方單位, add 1 to the 命中擲骰.
- If three **^^Crossfire^^** units were selected to perform a Deadly Crossfire against that 敵方單位, add 1 to the 命中擲骰 and add 1 to the 致傷擲骰.

rules.description:
During the Select Crusade Blessings step, you can spend your Planning points to purchase one or more Shrewd Strategy abilities. All Planning points unspent at the end of this step are lost. 每當 you purchase one of these abilities, 選擇一個 **^^基因竊取者教派^^** unit in your Crusade army; until the end of the battle, 該單位 has that ability and the first time it is set up on the battlefield, place the relevant Shrewd Strategy ability token next to it to remind you (and your opponent) that you have upgraded 該單位 that battle. You can purchase the same Shrewd Strategy ability multiple times, but each unit cannot have more than one Shrewd Strategy ability per battle.

Note that if a unit with a Shrewd Strategy ability 被摧毀 during the battle and a new identical unit is added to your Crusade army as a 結果為 the Cult Ambush ability, 該單位 does not have the Shrewd Strategy abilities that the original unit had.

sharedRules.description: If your Army 陣營 is GENESTEALER CULTS, you start the battle with a number of Resurgence points, depending on the battle size, as shown below. - 入侵戰: 6 Resurgence points - 打擊部隊: 10 Resurgence points - 猛攻戰: 14 Resurgence points. 每當 a unit 你軍隊中的 被摧毀, if every model in 該單位 has this ability, you can spend the relevant number of Resurgence points shown below based on 該單位's Starting 力量. [Aberrants: 5 models - 4 Resurgence points; 10 models - 8 Resurgence points. Acolyte Hybrids with 自動手槍s, Acolyte Hybrids with Hand 火焰噴射器s, Hybrid Metamorphs: 5 models - 2 Resurgence points; 10 models - 4 Resurgence points. Atalan Jackals: 5 models - 2 Resurgence points; 10 models - 6 Resurgence points. Neophyte Hybrids: 10 models - 3 Resurgence points; 20 models - 6 Resurgence points. Purestrain Genestealers: 5 models - 2 Resurgence points; 10 models - 6 Resurgence points.] 若如此做: - Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Cult Ambush, at its Starting 力量, with all of its 剩餘耐傷 and any [ONE SHOT] weapons those models are equipped with considered as not having been shot. - Place one Cult Ambush marker (see below) anywhere on the battlefield that is 超過 9 吋 horizontally away from all 敵方單位 (if this is not possible, no marker is placed).
sharedRules.name: 克烏爾特 阿姆布烏什
